methodology.paper: Hsieh et al. (2024), RULER: What's the Real Context Size of Your Long-Context Language Models?

note: S-NIAH is generated locally and deterministically from the cited RULER methodology. No external dataset is fetched or redistributed, so there is no dataset revision hash or dataset-license record. The reproducibility authorities are the generator code and hash, seed, complete configuration, materialized task hash, and pinned RULER commit recorded here.
